channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Liverpool increases lead atop Premier League as Arsenal drops more points
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — It feels like a matter of when, not if, Liverpool seals a record-equaling 20th English league title. The gap at the top of the Premier League was extended to 13 points on Wednesday after a 2-0 victory over Newcastle.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL and its competition committee reviewing overtime rules
item.description: The NFL is considering changing overtime rules in the regular season to decrease the advantage for teams who win the coin toss.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani to make spring training debut against Angels on Friday night, Roberts says
item.description: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts says three-time MVP Shohei Ohtani will make his first spring training appearance of the year on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mike Green tells reporters at NFL combine he left Virginia after being accused of sexual assault
item.description: NFL draft prospect Mike Green says he transferred from Virginia to Marshall after being accused of sexual assault for the second time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New Orleans Privateers players' suspensions related to possible NCAA violations, AP source says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Four New Orleans players who've been suspended since late January are under investigation for possible NCAA violations related to sports gambling, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Defensive end Abdul Carter says he's the best player in NFL 2025 draft class
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Former Penn State star Abdul Carter made one thing clear Wednesday: He should be the No. 1 overall pick in this year's NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auriemma and Martelli headline Joe Lapchick Character Award recipients
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Geno Auriemma and Phil Martelli headline this year's recipients of the Joe Lapchick Character Award. Joining the two coaches will be longtime men's basketball official Gene Steratore and former Fordham athletic director Frank McLaughlin.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to watch 49ers’ prospects at the NFL scouting combine
item.description: The 49ers will join all teams at the NFL scouting combine to assess top talent ahead of the draft in April.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Matildas condemn misogynistic comments by radio host about Australian women's soccer team
item.description: SYDNEY (AP) — The Matildas joined in the heavy criticism Wednesday of a commercial radio host’s misogynistic and crass comments about Australia’s national women’s soccer team. The host has since been taken off-air.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Japanese forward 'King Kazu' turns 58 and prepares for his 40th season in professional soccer
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese forward Kazuyoshi Miura turned 58 on Wednesday. Happy Birthday to the player known as “King Kazu.” But there's more to celebrate. He's also set to start his 40th season in professional soccer, the oldest player in the Japanese Football League.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia recovers from No. 3 Florida's comeback and defeat Gators 88-83 despite Richard's 30 points
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia guard Blue Cain sank a go-ahead 3-pointer with 47 seconds remaining after No. 3 Florida took its first lead by scoring 13 unanswered points, and the Bulldogs beat the Gators 88-83 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Eagles were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Instead, the Canadian team stood at the blue line, arm in arm, player and coach, wearing their championship hats while the maple leaf flag was lowered behind the 4 Nations Face-Off trophy and the national anthem reverberated across the Americans' home ice.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Victor Wembanyama expected to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis, Spurs announce
item.description: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama is expected to miss the remainder of the NBA regular season after being diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, the Spurs announced Thursday. It's a massive blow to the Spurs, who are contending for a playoff spot in the Western Conference.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State blasts San Jose State, 105-57
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team got back on track following Sunday's heartbreaking loss to New Mexico with a resounding beatdown over San Jose State Wednesday night, 105-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
